title: Section 36B
content: 1[ 2[36B.] High Court defined.--In this Part and in Part IIIA, "High Court", in relation to a banking company, means the High Court exercising Jurisdiction in the place where the registered office of the banking company is situated or, in the case of a banking company incorporated outside India, where its principal place of business in India is situated.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 52 of 1953, s. 3. 2. Section 36A renumbered as section 36B by Act 33 of 1959, s. 24 (w.e.f. 1-10-1959).
